ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the polling organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., Academic, Commercial, Non-profit) */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, campaign staff, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated poll */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the polling data was recorded */,
  "obama_percentage" REAL /* Percentage support for Obama on the recorded date */,
  "romney_percentage" REAL /* Percentage support for Romney on the recorded date */,
  "undecided_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of undecided voters on the recorded date */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the poll on the recorded date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " poll_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated poll */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response expected (e.g., Multiple Choice, Open-ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated question */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Number of respondents who chose this response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated poll */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic (e.g., Age, Gender, Income) */,
  "demographic_value" TEXT /* Value of the demographic (e.g., 18-29, Male, $50,000-$75,000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated poll */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
